definitions.es: Caer o dejar caer desde una posición más alta.
definitions.vi: Rơi hoặc để rơi từ một vị trí cao hơn.
definitions.en: To fall or drop from a higher position.

example.en: The apple fell to the ground.

exampleSentencesTranslated: He is sad because he fail the English exam last time.
If you don't study hard, you might fail the Math subject.
I have fail the driving test once already.

translation.en: The apple fell down to the ground.

exampleSentences: Anh ấy buồn vì rớt kỳ thi tiếng Anh lần trước.
Nếu em không học chăm chỉ, em có thể sẽ rớt môn Toán.
Chị đã từng rớt bài kiểm tra lái xe một lần rồi.
notes:
rớt = to fail (an exam, test, subject). You use it when someone doesn’t pass something academic or a test.

It often goes with things like kỳ thi, môn, bài kiểm tra, phỏng vấn.  

In the North, people more often say trượt (same meaning, a bit more standard). In the South, rớt is very common.  

Very common extra meaning: rớt can also mean “to fall/drop” (like something falling down).
notes_md:
**rớt** = to fail (an exam, test, subject). You use it when someone doesn’t pass something academic or a test.

It often goes with things like *kỳ thi, môn, bài kiểm tra, phỏng vấn*.  

In the North, people more often say **trượt** (same meaning, a bit more standard). In the South, **rớt** is very common.  

Very common extra meaning: **rớt** can also mean “to fall/drop” (like something falling down).

translation.en: The ball will fall if you drop it.

content.sentence: Quả bóng sẽ ___ nếu bạn thả.
